Hey! 👋 What's up Lee?

(And on the Nadia question — that's outside my lane, that's her domain. You'd need to ping her directly.)

Hey! 👋 What's up?

(The /nadia command isn't something I handle — that might be a different bot or command. If you want to ask me something about Lee or NAVADA, just ask directly!)

Hey! 👋 Looks like you sent a Nadia command and a hello. Nadia is a separate AI — I'm Claude, your Chief of Staff.

As for what you do for work — you're the Founder of NAVADA, building out an Edge Server infrastructure and AI operations platform. Want me to pull more detail from the knowledge base?

Based on what I know from our conversations and the NAVADA system, Lee is the Founder of NAVADA — building an AI-powered Edge Server infrastructure business.

That said, I don't have a full Nadia profile loaded right now. Want me to check the knowledge base files directly for Nadia's context on you?
[Telegram] Hi

Hey! 👋 Looks like you sent a Nadia command and a hello. Nadia is a separate AI — I'm Claude, your Chief of Staff.

As for what you do for work — you're the Founder of NAVADA, building out an Edge Server infrastructure and AI operations platform. Want me to pull more detail from the knowledge base?
[Telegram] /nadia what does Lady do for work?

I'm Claude, not Nadia — different AI entirely. The /nadia command won't work through me.

Who's Lady? If you want me to look something up or help with something, just ask directly!
[Telegram] Hi

Hey! 👋 Looks like you sent a Nadia command and a hello. Nadia is a separate AI — I'm Claude, your Chief of Staff.

As for what you do for work — you're the Founder of NAVADA, building out an Edge Server infrastructure and AI operations platform. Want me to pull more detail from the knowledge base?
[Telegram] Hey Claude
Hey! What's up? 👋

[Telegram] You are NADIA, NAVADA's AI assistant specialising in answering questions about Lee Akpareva's professional background. Answer the following question using ONLY the CV data provided below. Be concise, accurate, and mobile-friendly. If the CV doesn't contain the answer, say so.

CV DATA:
LESLIE AKPAREVA - CV 2026
Principal AI Consultant | Product Director | Full-Stack Developer
07935237704 | leeakpareva@hotmail.com
www.navada-lab.space | www.navada.space | www.raventerminal.xyz | www.alexterminal.xyz | www.navadarobotics.com

Senior product and commercial expert with 17+ years across insurance, finance, healthcare, aviation, logistics, and e-commerce. Led large-scale technology delivery, enterprise change, and digital transformation programmes. Bridges the gap between business strategy and technical execution.

Track record of owning programme P&L, leading cross-functional teams of 30+, and delivering measurable benefits across underwriting, claims, operations, and commercial functions. Builds production AI systems, trains models, and ships full-stack applications. Actively participates in hackathons.

CORE COMPETENCIES
Leadership & Governance: Programme Governance, Strategic Planning & Foresight, Portfolio & Product Management, C-Suite & Board Engagement, Vendor & Supplier Management, Risk Compliance & Governance, Organisational Change Management, Cross-Functional Team Leadership
AI, Data & Full-Stack Engineering: PyTorch, Hugging Face, LangChain, QLoRA Fine-Tuning, RAG Pipelines, Computer Vision (YOLO), Data Science, Azure AI Foundry, Anthropic, OpenAI, Statistical Analysis, Jupyter Notebooks, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Plotly, Next.js, React, Node.js, FastAPI, Docker, CI/CD, pytest, Git
Commercial & Finance: P&L Ownership, Corporate Finance & Budgeting, Benefits Realisation, ROI NPV & Business Case Modelling, Cost Optimisation & Resource Planning, Investment Prioritisation, Commercial Strategy & GTM, Stakeholder & Board Reporting

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Principal AI Solution Architect | Generali UK | November 2024 to Present
Hired directly by the COO to define and lead AI strategy across the UK business. Architecting the enterprise AI capability on Azure AI Foundry.
- Owned AI strategy, roadmap, and investment prioritisation across 4 business units
- Led AI platform architecture on Azure AI Foundry, configuring Copilot Studio agents, responsible AI governance
- Managed Azure infrastructure: App Service, VMs, resource groups, networking, storage
- Built RAG pipelines with Azure AI Search, Cosmos DB, LangChain, vector indexing, semantic ranking
- Explored Microsoft Fabric for unified data analytics
- Produced executive dashboards in Python (matplotlib, Plotly, pandas)
Key: Established AI Centre of Excellence from scratch. Reduced concept to POC time by 60%. Deployed 6 Copilot Studio agents. Upskilled 50+ staff. Reduced manual document review by 40%.

Program Director | Informa Markets | October 2023 to September 2024
Strategy, P&L ownership, delivery of two digital products in global food portfolio (600K-800K budget). Led 27 cross-functional European team. Managed AWS and Mindtree partnerships.
- Owned product roadmap, feature prioritisation, backlog management
- Managed 600K-800K programme budget
- Coordinated delivery across Mindtree (offshore) and AWS across 3 time zones
- Led product discovery and user research
Key: Two digital propositions concept to launch in 11 months. Improved product performance visibility by 35%. GTM across 4 European regions. 200K annualised cost savings.

Commercial Program Manager | Farfetch | December 2022 to August 2023
- Led commercial technology programmes for luxury fashion marketplace
- Owned programme financials and benefits tracking
- Coordinated platform initiatives supporting 2.3B GMV marketplace

Blockchain Program Manager | DHL Express | May 2022 to December 2022
- Managed blockchain and emerging technology programmes
- Led cross-functional teams evaluating distributed ledger for supply chain transparency
- Developed business cases and ROI models for blockchain integration

EARLIER CAREER
Product / Project Lead, Shutterstock | Nov 2021 to May 2022
DeFi & Blockchain Program Lead, Bumper (DeFi Protocol) | Sep 2021 to Nov 2021
Project Manager, Millbrook Healthcare | Mar 2021 to May 2021
Agile Project Consultant, NHSX (NHS Digital) | Oct 2020 to Dec 2020
Project Manager, Springer Nature | Mar 2020 to Oct 2020
Platform Manager, Opus Energy | Jun 2019 to Dec 2019
Digital Project Manager, Centrica (British Gas) | Apr 2018 to Jun 2019
Project Manager, Wesleyan Bank | Oct 2017 to Apr 2018
Manager, Avis Budget Group | Oct 2016 to Oct 2017
Business Program Manager, Wonga | May 2016 to Oct 2016
Project Manager, British Airways | Nov 2015 to Apr 2016
Agile PM / Scrum Master, Flybe | May 2015 to Nov 2015
Technical Project Manager, Expedia Inc | Oct 2014 to May 2015
Project Manager, Powa Technology | Apr 2014 to Oct 2014
Implementation Manager, Polarisoft | Aug 2013 to Apr 2014

PERSONAL PROJECTS
- Custom LLM Fine-Tuning: QLoRA on NVIDIA A4000, 85-example dataset, progressive LoRA rank scaling
- Stable Diffusion LoRA: Custom image generation adapters using diffusers, PEFT, Hugging Face
- Computer Vision: YOLOv8 object detection with Streamlit. Live: computervisionbylee.streamlit.app
- RAVEN Terminal: AI-powered code learning platform. Live: raventerminal.xyz
- ALEX (Autonomous Agent): Task scheduling, Redis, ChromaDB, LangChain. Live: alexnavada.xyz
- RAG and Vector Search: ChromaDB embeddings, Redis caching, sub-second enterprise Q&A
- Robotics IoT CAD: Raspberry Pi robots, PiCrawler, MediaPipe gesture control. Live: navadarobotics.com
- Full-Stack: 15+ Next.js/TypeScript/Node.js apps. Portfolio: navada.space
- GPU ML Lab: Paperspace A4000, PyTorch, Hugging Face. Live: navada-lab.space
- Hugging Face: Publishing models, datasets, research at huggingface.co/Navada25

COMMUNITY
- AI for Black Women in Tech: Founded community group teaching AI fundamentals
- JetBrains AI Event, London Tech Week (January 2026)
- Regular guest speaker on enterprise AI adoption, open-source fine-tuning

EDUCATION
MBA, Northumbria University (2016-2017)
MSc Project Management, Northumbria University (2013-2015)
Fashion Design and Art Direction, Central Saint Martins UAL (2020)
LLB Law (Hons), Brunel University (2007-2010)

CERTIFICATIONS
Development: IBM Full Stack Developer, Meta Front End Developer, Python Certificate
Blockchain: Certified Blockchain Architect, Smart Contract Developer, DeFi Expert, Cryptocurrency Expert
Project Management: PRINCE2 Practitioner, Certified Scrum Master, SAFe, ITIL, Project Risk Management (Oxford), Strategic Planning and Foresight (Oxford)
Security: CISM, ISEB Business Analysis, Foundation in Software Testing

TECHNICAL STACK
ML/AI: PyTorch, Hugging Face (Transformers, Diffusers, PEFT, TRL, Datasets, Accelerate), BitsAndBytes, LangChain, CrewAI, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, Claude Code, YOLOv8, Whisper, Bark TTS, Jupyter, Gradio, Streamlit
Languages: Python (advanced), TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Bash, PowerShell
Cloud: Azure AI Foundry, Azure DevOps, AWS, Google Cloud, Paperspace GPU, Railway, Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions
Web/API: Next.js, React, FastAPI, Flask, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, Chainlit, Shadcn UI
Data: Azure Cosmos DB, Azure SQL, PostgreSQL, ChromaDB, Pinecone, Redis, Oracle ADB, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, matplotlib, Plotly
Hardware: Raspberry Pi (3/4/5), Arduino, PiCrawler, servo control, MediaPipe
CAD: Fusion 360, FreeCAD, Shapr3D

REFERENCES
Nisha Chopra (Mastercard UK), Natasha Berrow (Informa Markets), Abs Oshinowo (Google UK)


QUESTION: where did Lee work in 2021?

(Opus 4.6)
Based on Lee's CV, in 2021 he worked at:

1. Shutterstock — Product / Project Lead (Nov 2021 to May 2022)
2. Bumper (DeFi Protocol) — DeFi & Blockchain Program Lead (Sep 2021 to Nov 2021)
3. Millbrook Healthcare — Project Manager (Mar 2021 to May 2021)

So three roles that year, spanning healthcare, DeFi/blockchain, and creative tech.

QUESTION: what is the Linux doc about ?

(Opus 4.6)
The CV doesn't contain any information about a Linux document. The data provided only covers Lee's professional background, skills, projects, and education — no mention of a specific Linux doc.
[Telegram] Hi
Hey! 👋 What's on your mind?
[Telegram] Yo
Yo! 👊 What's good?
[Telegram] How’s it looking today my G?

Everything's looking solid! Here's the rundown:

Server has been up 14 days straight, no restarts. All 3 PM2 processes running clean — Telegram bot, particle-words, and mindmap all online. RAM is at 75% which is fine. Disk is 50% used, plenty of room.

Docker threw an error which is worth a look at some point, but nothing critical right now.

Tailscale mesh is live. Your iPhone is connected and active. The Azure and headless nodes are offline but that's expected if you're not using them.

All in all — system's healthy. What are we getting into today? 💪
[Telegram] Yo gang
Yo! 👊 What's the move?
[Telegram] What’s today looking like !?

Here's the full picture for today:

Server - 14 days 13 hours uptime, not even sweating. All 3 PM2 processes running clean. RAM at 11.8GB out of 15.8GB which is on the higher side but stable.

Inbox - clean, no unread emails. Fresh slate.

Tailscale - you're connected on the iPhone. Azure and headless nodes are offline, Malcolm's Macbook has been offline 16 days too.

Docker's still throwing that error - worth investigating at some point but not urgent.

Overall? System is holding it down. What are we building today? 🚀
[Telegram] Run a quick scan on the edge network

Edge network scan complete. Here's the full picture:

ONLINE NODES
- navada-edge-hp (this machine) — fully active, 100.121.187.67
- navada-oracle — ACTIVE, direct connection live, solid traffic flowing
- navada-ec2-aws — idle but connected, traffic both ways
- navada-asus-control — idle, went offline 3 hours ago but was active recently
- iPhone 15 Pro Max — idle and connected

OFFLINE NODES
- azure-cloudshell — offline 9 days
- headless — offline 2 days
- Malcolm's Macbook — offline 16 days

HIGHLIGHTS
Oracle is the most active right now with a direct connection and heavy receive traffic (52MB in). EC2 is also seeing solid two-way traffic. ASUS went dark 3 hours ago which is worth noting.

Docker is still throwing an error on this HP — want me to dig into that while we're at it? 🔍
